name: ravari-store
description: Ravari Store - Luxury Lifestyle E-commerce Platform

scripts.build: echo '=== Installing root dependencies ===' && npm install && echo '=== Building frontend ===' && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && echo '=== Frontend build complete ===' && cd ../backend && npm install && echo '=== Build complete ==='
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
